title: evodiopanax innovans
intro: Evodiopanax innovans, also known as the "five-fingered evodia," is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of limonoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Evodiopanax innovans include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use in treating gastrointestinal disorders. Evodiopanax innovans is traditionally prepared as a herbal medicine by boiling its roots, stems, or leaves to create a decoction that can be used to treat various health conditions.
